'''''Jolly Man''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] used by the [[New Jedi Order]] as part of the [[Wild Knights]]. It was used to transport their non-[[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] equipped ships (2 [[I-7 Howlrunner]]s and 3 [[A-9 Vigilance interceptor|A-9 Vigilances]]).

It participated in the attempts to capture a [[yammosk]] at the [[Assault on Arkania]], as [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] at the [[Operation Safe Passage|Battle of Talfaglio]], and at the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Ship-stub}}
